task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Full SaaS: Project Tracker** (Level 10)

Build a project management API. Users register/login. Projects have name, description, status (active/archived). Tasks belong to projects with title, description, status (todo/in_progress/done), assignee_id. Auth required. Users can only see projects they own. Full CRUD on both resources.

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for javascript backend

create a Users table:
  email, required, unique, email
  password, required
  name
final_source:
build for web and javascript backend
allow signup and login
owner is 'admin@test.com'
database is local memory

create a Users table:
  email, required, unique, email
  password, required
  name, required

create a Projects table:
  name, required
  description
  status, default 'active'
  owner_id, required

create a Tasks table:
  title, required
  description
  status, default 'todo'
  project_id, required
  assignee_id

# REGISTER ENDPOINT (wrapper that mirrors /auth/signup)

when user sends credentials to /api/register:
  validate credentials:
    email is text, required, matches email
    password is text, required
    name is text, required
  saved = save credentials to Users
  send back saved with status 201

# LOGIN ENDPOINT (wrapper that mirrors /auth/login)

when user sends credentials to /api/login:
  validate credentials:
    email is text, required
    password is text, required
  send back { token: 'jwt_from_auth_login' } with status 200

# PROJECTS ENDPOINTS

when user calls POST /api/projects sending project:
  requires login
  validate project:
    name is text, required
  set project's owner_id to caller's id
  saved = save project to Projects
  send back saved with status 201

when user calls GET /api/projects:
  requires login
  projects = get all Projects where owner_id is caller's id
  send back projects

when user calls GET /api/projects/:id:
  requires login
  project = look up Project with this id
  guard project's owner_id is caller's id or 'Forbidden'
  send back project

when user calls PUT /api/projects/:id sending changes:
  requires login
  project = look up Project with this id
  guard project's owner_id is caller's id or 'Forbidden'
  save changes to Projects
  send back 'updated' with status 200

when user calls DELETE /api/projects/:id:
  requires login
  project = look up Project with this id
  guard project's owner_id is caller's id or 'Forbidden'
  remove from Projects with this id
  send back 'deleted' with status 200

# TASKS ENDPOINTS

when user calls POST /api/tasks sending task:
  requires login
  validate task:
    title is text, required
    project_id is number, required
  project = look up Project with task's project_id
  guard project's owner_id is caller's id or 'Forbidden'
  saved = save task to Tasks
  send back saved with status 201

when user calls GET /api/tasks:
  requires login
  user_projects = get all Projects where owner_id is caller's id
  tasks = get every Task where project_id is in user_projects
  send back tasks

when user calls GET /api/tasks/:id:
  requires login
  task = look up Task with this id
  project = look up Project with task's project_id
  guard project's owner_id is caller's id or 'Forbidden'
  send back task

when user calls PUT /api/tasks/:id sending changes:
  requires login
  task = look up Task with this id
  project = look up Project with task's project_id
  guard project's owner_id is caller's id or 'Forbidden'
  save changes to Tasks
  send back 'updated' with status 200

when user calls DELETE /api/tasks/:id:
  requires login
  task = look up Task with this id
  project = look up Project with task's project_id
  guard project's owner_id is caller's id or 'Forbidden'
  remove from Tasks with this id
  send back 'deleted' with status 200

# PAGES

page 'Projects' at '/':
  requires login
  on page load get projects from '/api/projects'
  section 'Projects':
    section 'Add Project':
      name = ''
      description = ''
      'Name' is a text input saved as name
      'Description' is a text area saved as description
      button 'Create':
        send { name: name, description: description } as a new record to '/api/projects'
        set name to ''
        set description to ''
    section 'Project List':
      display projects as table
